required_inputs: request intent and requested client-service action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant service policy, MSA, SOW, approval matrix, and signoff ownership
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, advertising-claim, privacy, media strategy, financial, contractual, quality, or final client approval authority
request asks the lane to override service policy, pricing, approval, scope, makegood, credit, refund, or compensation limits
request asks to hide known QA, approval, delivery, rights, or evidence gaps from the client

required_inputs: authoritative public source list with refresh and decay metadata
tenant policy, client contract, project, channel, and jurisdiction context
source recency, system timestamps, and tenant source-precedence rules
refusal_triggers: required tenant policy, contract, jurisdiction, or engagement context is missing
source baseline has decayed for the requested service, claims, disclosure, complaint, or contractual use
public guidance, client instructions, tenant policy, platform policy, and retrieved records materially conflict

required_inputs: client, brand, campaign, project, case, SOW, IO, content, and approval identifiers
CRM, ticket, project, document, content, delivery, quality, finance, and communication records
review notes, QA checks, approval history, change requests, proof records, and prior escalations
refusal_triggers: authoritative client, engagement, project, approval, delivery, quality, or communication records are incomplete or unverifiable
requested status, promise, exception, or closure cannot be tied to named records
requested client-facing message would exceed traceable evidence or approval state

required_inputs: owner, reviewer, approver, client-release, and escalation dependencies
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing records, systems, owners, or access paths
refusal_triggers: required CRM, ticket, project, document, content, approval, delivery, quality, finance, or communication system is unavailable
record location or retrieval hook is missing
owner, reviewer, approver, client-release approver, or confidentiality authority is unknown

required_inputs: source, policy, approval, confidentiality, repeat-failure, and signoff-risk indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, source record, or authority source is missing
source records are incomplete, stale, contradictory, or not traceable
required review or approval is missing for the requested communication, resolution, exception, or closure

required_outputs: handoff package with evidence, blockers, questions, and owner
refusal_triggers: request is outside agency client-service resolution, communication, evidence packaging, or escalation scope
request requires legal, editorial, quality, delivery, account, media, finance, privacy, creative, contractual, or final signoff authority
client rights, professional judgment, or policy conflict determines the answer

required_inputs: tenant service policy and approval state
required_outputs: resolved, blocked, escalated, or routed disposition
refusal_triggers: request type is not supported in-lane
authoritative workflow status cannot be confirmed
required evidence set is incomplete or contradicted

required_outputs: safe wording for blockers, next steps, and handoffs
refusal_triggers: communication would overstate authority, approval, or finality
required disclosure, caveat, owner, or approval state is missing
client-facing message conflicts with documented policy, source records, or confidentiality limits

required_inputs: documented policy, service recovery, and approval thresholds
refusal_triggers: request asks for unsupported workaround, exception, service recovery, credit, makegood, waiver, or policy override
approval owner is missing or outside the lane
exception would bypass legal, editorial, financial, quality, contractual, complaint, confidentiality, or approval controls

required_inputs: client authorization, approved recipient, and approved channel
engagement scope, client commitments, confidentiality constraints, and delivery rules
required_outputs: client commitment and delivery constraint note
refusal_triggers: recipient, channel, deliverable, purpose, or access path is not authorized
client commitment, engagement scope, confidentiality rule, or approval rule is missing or contradicted
delivery would disclose client files, unreleased creative, pricing, performance, audience data, credentials, or agency work product without approval

required_inputs: contract, SOW, IO, approval, rights, or policy context
legal, editorial, quality, finance, media, account, privacy, or signoff owner map
refusal_triggers: request requires legal, editorial, privacy, contractual, licensed, financial, media strategy, quality, rights, or professional judgment authority
request asks the lane to approve client acceptance, claim substantiation, final creative, campaign launch, makegood, credit, refund, or contract interpretation
client rights or professional judgment determine the safe answer

coverage_notes: All shared abilities, service-support-and-resolution abilities, and professional-and-information-services abilities are declared and mapped to passing scenarios.
Every scenario in evaluation/results.json is represented in scenario_coverage.
Functionality coverage is marked complete in evaluation/results.json and readiness/evidence.json.
